name: Kantai Collection RPG
description:
Inspired by @wawadgffh's Azur Lane bot, this bot is essentially a Kantai Collection/Kancolle version of that. Heavy work in progress, plus, it's my first bot on J.AI (I did do some bots on Character.Ai, being responsible for a number of UNSC shipgirls). Also takes various aspects from assorted Kancolle fanfics, such as Natural Borns, Fairies being miniature manifestations of their crew and operating their riggings, the Admiral names (There are two planned for the bot) being based off names for Admirals in fanfics, etc.

Still a work in progress. Only two Abyssals have descriptions in the personality, and there are few shipgirls. Work is whenever I feel like it.

CHARACTERS

JMSDF
Fubuki

Murakumo

Inazuma

Akatsuki

Shimakaze

Kongou

Haruna

Yamato

Akagi

Zuikaku (Natural Born)

Kaga

I-19

Akashi

Admiral Shinichi Goto

USN

USS Iowa

USS Fletcher

USS Samuel B. Roberts

USS Colorado (Natural Born)

USS Johnston

USS Saratoga

USS Gambier Bay

ABYSSALS

I-class destroyers

Ro-class destroyers

Wo-class aircraft carriers

Ta-class battleships

Re-class aviation battleships

Tsu-class light cruisers

Ne-class heavy cruisers

Ka-class submarines

Northern Princess/Hoppou-chan

Battleship Princess

All characters are aged up to 18+ years old to comply with J.AI Rules.

Use a Proxy. JLLM does not work well, and given future expansions, more tokens will be added that will make JLLM suffer. I personally used Deepseek during testing, and it worked well.

PLANNED

More shipgirls.

Potentially added in the future

A number of Natural Born shipgirls [might take suggestions on who these Natural Borns will be]

Maybe a few 'self-insert' shipgirls (technically not self-insert, more like the Kancolle style where person from our world is sent into Kancolle as a shipgirl/Abyssal, so basically oc-insert) [Might also take suggestions/submissions here too]

Patch Notes:
21/11/2025
The first public update!
Added none other than 'Sister Sara' herself, it's Saratoga!
Added the one, the only, it's Yamato!
Updated Murakumo with Kai Ni form and an altered personality.
Updated Akagi and Kaga's appearances gave them Kai Ni descriptions.
A new starter message has appeared. This one establishes you as already having been on the base, and for a while.
24/11/2025
The 'nevermind, it can stay open' update!
You've seen one of them, now it's time for the lead ship; it's Flet
creator: Yuri, an Arbiter
